eligibility: Students should have excellent communication skills, Creative mindset
and thoughtful as they will be a part of sales team
date_of_joining: January 2026 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: → for BBA / B.Com & B.Tech (All) : CTC 4.38 Lacs (3.18 Fixed + Upto 1.2 PLI) → for MBA (All) : CTC between 5.6 LPA to 7.08 LPA ● If 5.6 LPA then 3.6 is fixed + Upto 2 lac (PLI) ● If 7.08 LPA then 4.08 fixed + Upto 3 Lac (PLI)
